The '''borer beetle''' was a type of insect native to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] shields were often stylized with the telltale eyespots found on the backs of these creatures. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] found a specimen of this species on the premises of the [[Dathomir Imperial Prison]]. It is unknown how it found its way there.

==Behind the scenes==
Borer beetles appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
